title: Account Reconciliation — Balance Verification
description: The system shall provide a Reconciliation flow for any account where the user specifies a date/time and the actual real-world balance at that moment. The system shall compute and display the discrepancy (actual minus recorded balance at the selected moment). If the discrepancy is zero, the system shall record a reconciliation mark on the account for that timestamp. If a discrepancy exists, the system shall present appropriate correction actions.
acceptance_criteria: Reconciliation flow includes a date/time picker pre-filled with the current system time
The screen displays the 'Recorded Balance' as the sum of all transactions for that account with `date <= selected_reconciliation_time`
Transactions with `date > selected_reconciliation_time` are excluded from the recorded balance calculation
The discrepancy is computed as: user-entered balance minus recorded balance at selected time
When discrepancy is 0, a 'Reconciled ✓' confirmation is shown; no transaction is created
When discrepancy is non-zero, the flow proceeds to correction (FR-011 or FR-012) using the selected reconciliation date/time for the correction transaction
